name: Lamb Soup Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Make stock: Place lamb bones, ginger, onions, and water in a stock pot. Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 hours, reducing liquid by half. Skim any froth that forms.
2. Shred the lamb meat. Add the shredded meat, salt, sugar, and light sherry to the stock. Simmer for another 20 minutes.
3. Finish soup: Wash and soak "cloud ears." Soak noodles for a few minutes until soft. Drain and rinse mustard green; slice into shreds. Rinse bean sprouts. Wash and remove roots from scallions; shred on bias, greens and all.
4. Prepare Fire Pot: Heat charcoal briquettes until they turn white. Transfer them to the bottom of the Fire Pot. Place the pot on a heat-proof tile on your table. Add half the broth and half the other ingredients (cloud ears, black fungus, scallions, mustard green, bean sprouts), reserving the rest for later in dinner.
5. Serve after the broth has boiled briefly.
